testcase.name: registerUserWithoutRequiredData
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: registerAlreadyExistUser
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-07T09:40:29.511+02:00 INFO 39346 --- [etudiant-backend] [ main] c.o.etudiant.service.UserService : Registering new user Hibernate: select u1_0.id,u1_0.created_at,u1_0.first_name,u1_0.last_name,u1_0.login,u1_0.password,u1_0.updated_at from user u1_0 where u1_0.login=? Hibernate: insert into user (created_at,first_name,last_name,login,password,updated_at) values (?,?,?,?,?,?) 2026-05-07T09:40:29.721+02:00 INFO 39346 --- [etudiant-backend] [ main] c.o.etudiant.service.UserService : Registering new user Hibernate: select u1_0.id,u1_0.created_at,u1_0.first_name,u1_0.last_name,u1_0.login,u1_0.password,u1_0.updated_at from user u1_0 where u1_0.login=? 2026-05-07T09:40:29.732+02:00 ERROR 39346 --- [etudiant-backend] [ main] c.o.e.handler.RestExceptionHandler : User with login login already exists
